event.title: Interoperability goes to court: a case for Software Freedom in Gothenburg, Sweden

body.p: Lucas Lasota, FSFE Legal Programme Manager will present a talk at FOSS North how interoperability regulation is key for Free Software, as it allows developers to access features and functionalities in proprietary operating systems which were exclusively controlled only by Apple. The audience will learn why platform regulation is important for Free Software. The talk will take place 27.04.2026 in Gothenburg, Sweden.
